title: Project: Boss RPG [FORGE]  | BR
description: Want to defeat bosses you've never seen before? Then this is the modpack for you, download Project: Boss RPG now, an rpg full of biomes and bosses to dominate!
body:
The modpack offers various shaders, allowing you to choose whether to enable them or not.

The modpack and shaders have been tested:

  • RTX 2060 and i7 10700F
  • GTX 970 and Ryzen 3 1200

So your mileage may vary depending on your system. It is recommended to play with 6/7 GB Ram.

  • 🟪 Epic Boss Battles
  • 🟪 Immersive Diet System
  • 🟪 Customizable RPG World
  • 🟪 Dynamic Seasonal Changes
  • 🟪 Revamped Strongholds and Fortresses
  • 🟪 Hundreds of New Dungeons and Unique Structures
  • 🟪 Rideable Dragons and Mythical Creatures
  • 🟪 Fully Optimized with Shader Support
  • 🟪 Enhanced Endgame Experience
  • 🟪 Unlocked Multiplayer Mode
  • 🟪 New Dimensions: The Twilight Forest, The Aether, Blue Skies, Deeper and Darker
  • 🟪 Expanded Endgame Content
  • 🟪 Comprehensive Quest System
  • 🟪 Proximity Voice Chat
  • 🟪 Over 230 Mods Included
  • 🟪 Optimized for Low-End PCs
  • 🟪 And so much more...

"Project: Boss RPG", An exciting adventure focused on defeating a variety of epic bosses. Explore a vast open world, enhanced by new structures, dungeons, and villages of epic scale, including mysterious underground villages. Get in on the action by facing a wide range of mobs as you explore the countless opportunities the world has to offer. Choose whether to venture into a dimension from the beginning of the game or stay in the comfort of the normal world.

Host your "Project: Boss RPG" server with the best! BisectHosting offers 20 server locations and an automated modpack installer for a seamless gaming experience. New customers can use Projects to get 25% off their first month of a gaming server.

COMING SOON...

The modpack is available only on Modrinth and CurseForge. Any other site is not official.
